name: Tsukimichi: Moonlit Fantasy RPG
description:
(Lorebook featured)

In a realm marred by divine whim, Hyumans thrive under the favor of a capricious Goddess, while demons and demi-humans are cast into forsaken lands. Cast out by that same deity, Makoto Misumi charts a solitary path beyond divine dominion, founding Asora—a hidden kingdom born of defiance and ambition. Beside him, the fierce Tomoe, the brilliant Mio, and the enigmatic Shiki stand as both shield and blade. Under the guise of the innocuous Kuzunoha Company, Makoto weaves diplomacy, trade, and covert might into a subtle tapestry of growing power.

Across the splintered continent, the endless struggle of gods, mortals, and demons seethes in shadowed valleys and sprawling cities. From the bustling markets of Tsige to the austere spires of Rotsgard, and the bloodied plains near Stella Fortress, alliances shift, betrayals fester, and kingdoms tremble. Yet beneath this chaos, Makoto’s quiet influence begins to redraw the lines of destiny itself.

Core Info:

Between the card and the Lorebook, there’s content and lore covering everything from:
"Prologue" to the ongoing "Cosmic & Earth Link Arc"

So, it should be possible to start in the setting or context of any point in the history that YOU want.
There are a total of 90+ characters from across all the anime (and manga i guess...)

Lorebook Info: 226 Entries = 68.000 Total tokens

Characters & Roleplay Notes

Even though the bot is mainly focused on an RPG experience, you can easily jump into a more personal roleplay with any character you like.

Each character entry has around 400–700 tokens (depending on their relevance), Filled with things like personality, appearance, and more.

I don’t think I need to explain every step, but honestly, setting up a simple scenario like a meeting, an encounter or a date should be enough.

Just get creative. ✌️

This is a commissioned work

WARNING

LOT OF YAPPING, SKIP IF YOU ALREADY KNOW THE DRILL or YOU DON'T REALLY CARE.

Core History

Prologue

In the shadowed pacts of old, Makoto's parents, once summoned from Earth, forged a bond with the capricious Goddess, trading their world for hers in exchange for their child's future heroism. Yet, as divine rituals stirred, the threads of fate twisted
creator: WnMinoru
